handoff.handoffNotes: 1 small task covers all 3 user stories. Combined because: (1) only ~20 lines total across 3 files, (2) all stories are tightly coupled (test needs function, npm test needs package.json), (3) cannot test any component in isolation without the others. e2eRequired:false because this is a CLI/unit-test project, not a web UI — verification is via 'npm test' exit code 0. No Playwright/E2E infrastructure needed for this smoke test.
